mapper.insert: INSERT INTO act_import_batch ( batch_code, batch_name, import_source_type, origin_name, source_root_path, storage_root_path, total_file_count, resolved_json_count, success_count, failure_count, import_status, progress_percent, progress_message, operator_id, result_json, error_message, started_at, finished_at, status, remark, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{batchCode}, #{batchName}, #{importSourceType}, #{originName}, #{sourceRootPath}, #{storageRootPath}, #{totalFileCount}, #{resolvedJsonCount}, #{successCount}, #{failureCount}, #{importStatus}, #{progressPercent}, #{progressMessage}, #{operatorId}, #{resultJson}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, 1, #{remark}, '1' )
mapper.update: UPDATE act_import_batch SET resolved_json_count = #{resolvedJsonCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, import_status = 'RUNNING', progress_percent = #{progressPercent}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, result_json = #{resultJson}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE act_import_batch_id = #{batchId}

UPDATE act_import_batch SET resolved_json_count = #{resolvedJsonCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, import_status = #{importStatus}, progress_percent = 100.00, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, result_json = #{resultJson}, finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE act_import_batch_id = #{batchId}

UPDATE act_import_batch SET import_status = 'FAILED', progress_message = #{progressMessage}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE act_import_batch_id = #{batchId}
mapper.select: SELECT act_paper_id, paper_code, paper_name, question_count, auto_gradable_question_count FROM act_paper WHERE paper_code = #{paperCode} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT act_paper_id, paper_code, paper_name, exam_board, exam_type, test_date, region_code, region_name, session_code, session_name, source_name, source_file_hash, duration_seconds, question_count, auto_gradable_question_count, total_score, metadata_json, create_time, update_time FROM act_paper WHERE act_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT section_name FROM act_section WHERE status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' AND section_name IS NOT NULL AND section_name != '' GROUP BY section_name ORDER BY MIN(sort_order), section_name

SELECT DISTINCT act_paper_id FROM act_section WHERE status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' AND ( LOWER(section_name) = LOWER(#{section}) OR LOWER(section_code) = LOWER(#{section}) ) ORDER BY act_paper_id ASC

SELECT act_section_id, act_paper_id, section_code, section_name, section_no, duration_seconds, question_count, instructions_html, instructions_text, structure_json, sort_order FROM act_section WHERE act_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, act_section_id ASC

SELECT act_passage_id, act_paper_id, act_section_id, passage_code, passage_title, passage_type, content_html, content_text, content_hash, structure_json, sort_order FROM act_passage WHERE act_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, act_passage_id ASC

SELECT act_group_id, act_paper_id, act_section_id, act_passage_id, group_code, group_title, source_question_no, raw_type, stat_type, instructions_html, instructions_text, content_html, content_text, has_shared_options, has_blanks, structure_json, sort_order FROM act_group WHERE act_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, act_group_id ASC

SELECT act_question_id, act_paper_id, act_section_id, act_passage_id, act_group_id, question_code, source_question_no, question_no_display, question_type, response_mode, auto_gradable, stem_html, stem_text, content_html, content_text, answer_input_schema_json, score, source_json_path, raw_json, sort_order FROM act_question WHERE act_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, act_question_id ASC

SELECT act_asset_id, act_paper_id, act_section_id, act_passage_id, act_group_id, act_group_option_id, act_question_id, owner_type, owner_id, asset_type, asset_role, asset_name, source_path, source_json_path, source_html_field, storage_path, asset_url, file_hash, source_data_uri_hash, mime_type, file_size, image_width_px, image_height_px, sort_order FROM act_asset WHERE act_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY owner_type ASC, owner_id ASC, sort_order ASC, act_asset_id ASC

SELECT q.act_question_id, q.act_paper_id, q.act_section_id, q.act_passage_id, q.act_group_id, q.question_code, q.source_question_no, q.question_no_display, q.question_type, q.response_mode, q.auto_gradable, q.stem_html, q.stem_text, q.content_html, q.content_text, q.answer_input_schema_json, q.score, q.source_json_path, q.raw_json, q.sort_order, g.group_code, g.group_title, g.raw_type AS group_raw_type, g.stat_type AS group_stat_type, g.instructions_html AS group_instructions_html, g.instructions_text AS group_instructions_text, g.content_html AS group_content_html, g.content_text AS group_content_text, s.section_code, s.section_name, s.section_no, s.instructions_html AS section_instructions_html, s.instructions_text AS section_instructions_text, p.paper_code, p.paper_name, p.exam_board, p.exam_type FROM act_question q JOIN act_group g ON g.act_group_id = q.act_group_id AND g.status = 1 AND g.delete_flag = '1' JOIN act_section s ON s.act_section_id = q.act_section_id AND s.status = 1 AND s.delete_flag = '1' JOIN act_paper p ON p.act_paper_id = q.act_paper_id AND p.status = 1 AND p.delete_flag = '1' WHERE q.act_question_id = #{questionId} AND q.status = 1 AND q.delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT act_question_answer_id, act_question_id, answer_raw, answer_json, explanation_html, explanation_text, grading_mode FROM act_question_answer WHERE act_question_id = #{questionId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT act_group_option_id, act_group_id, option_key, option_html, option_text, structure_json, sort_order FROM act_group_option WHERE act_group_id = #{groupId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, act_group_option_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO act_paper ( paper_code, paper_name, exam_board, exam_type, test_date, region_code, region_name, session_code, session_name, source_name, source_file_hash, duration_seconds, question_count, auto_gradable_question_count, total_score, metadata_json, status, remark, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{paperCode}, #{paperName}, #{examBoard}, #{examType}, #{testDate}, #{regionCode}, #{regionName}, #{sessionCode}, #{sessionName}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceFileHash}, #{durationSeconds}, #{questionCount}, #{autoGradableQuestionCount}, #{totalScore}, #{metadataJson}, 1, #{remark}, '1' )

INSERT INTO act_source_file ( act_import_batch_id, act_paper_id, source_file_type, source_file_name, source_file_hash, storage_path, asset_url, parse_status, parse_result_json, parse_warning_json, import_version, status, error_message, remark, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{actImportBatchId}, #{actPaperId}, #{sourceFileType}, #{sourceFileName}, #{sourceFileHash}, #{storagePath}, #{assetUrl}, #{parseStatus}, #{parseResultJson}, #{parseWarningJson}, 1, 1, #{errorMessage}, #{remark}, '1' )

INSERT INTO act_section ( act_paper_id, section_code, section_name, section_no, duration_seconds, question_count, instructions_html, instructions_text, structure_json, sort_order, status, remark, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{actPaperId}, #{sectionCode}, #{sectionName}, #{sectionNo}, #{durationSeconds}, #{questionCount}, #{instructionsHtml}, #{instructionsText}, #{structureJson}, #{sortOrder}, 1, #{remark}, '1' )

INSERT INTO act_passage ( act_paper_id, act_section_id, passage_code, passage_title, passage_type, content_html, content_text, content_hash, structure_json, sort_order, status, remark, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{actPaperId}, #{actSectionId}, #{passageCode}, #{passageTitle}, #{passageType}, #{contentHtml}, #{contentText}, #{contentHash}, #{structureJson}, #{sortOrder}, 1, #{remark}, '1' )

INSERT INTO act_group ( act_paper_id, act_section_id, act_passage_id, group_code, group_title, source_question_no, raw_type, stat_type, instructions_html, instructions_text, content_html, content_text, has_shared_options, has_blanks, structure_json, sort_order, status, remark, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{actPaperId}, #{actSectionId}, #{actPassageId}, #{groupCode}, #{groupTitle}, #{sourceQuestionNo}, #{rawType}, #{statType}, #{instructionsHtml}, #{instructionsText}, #{contentHtml}, #{contentText}, #{hasSharedOptions}, #{hasBlanks}, #{structureJson}, #{sortOrder}, 1, #{remark}, '1' )

INSERT INTO act_group_option ( act_group_id, option_key, option_html, option_text, structure_json, sort_order, status, remark, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{actGroupId}, #{optionKey}, #{optionHtml}, #{optionText}, #{structureJson}, #{sortOrder}, 1, #{remark}, '1' )

INSERT INTO act_question ( act_paper_id, act_section_id, act_passage_id, act_group_id, question_code, source_question_no, question_no_display, question_type, response_mode, auto_gradable, stem_html, stem_text, content_html, content_text, answer_input_schema_json, score, source_json_path, raw_json, sort_order, status, remark, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{actPaperId}, #{actSectionId}, #{actPassageId}, #{actGroupId}, #{questionCode}, #{sourceQuestionNo}, #{questionNoDisplay}, #{questionType}, #{responseMode}, #{autoGradable}, #{stemHtml}, #{stemText}, #{contentHtml}, #{contentText}, #{answerInputSchemaJson}, #{score}, #{sourceJsonPath}, #{rawJson}, #{sortOrder}, 1, #{remark}, '1' )

INSERT INTO act_question_answer ( act_question_id, answer_raw, answer_json, explanation_html, explanation_text, grading_mode, status, remark, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{actQuestionId}, #{answerRaw}, #{answerJson}, #{explanationHtml}, #{explanationText}, #{gradingMode}, 1, #{remark}, '1' )

INSERT INTO act_asset ( act_paper_id, act_section_id, act_passage_id, act_group_id, act_group_option_id, act_question_id, owner_type, owner_id, asset_type, asset_role, asset_name, source_path, source_json_path, source_html_field, storage_path, asset_url, file_hash, source_data_uri_hash, mime_type, file_size, image_width_px, image_height_px, sort_order, status, remark, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{actPaperId}, #{actSectionId}, #{actPassageId}, #{actGroupId}, #{actGroupOptionId}, #{actQuestionId}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{assetType}, #{assetRole}, #{assetName}, #{sourcePath}, #{sourceJsonPath}, #{sourceHtmlField}, #{storagePath}, #{assetUrl}, #{fileHash}, #{sourceDataUriHash}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSize}, #{imageWidthPx}, #{imageHeightPx}, #{sortOrder}, 1, #{remark}, '1' )
